race.comment: REEL CRYSTAL (7) has gone from strength to strength this prep, handling the rise in trip with ease last start on the Acton. Expect her to be more forward from the inside alley and give a good kick when they quicken. She's the obvious threat. JUSTIFIABLY (1) backs up quickly after just missing last time at Albury over this trip. Loves this distance, though has a tough carry with the big weight. FIRST DAY (3) has been getting too far back of late but finishing well. Doesn't mind it soft under foot and is one to keep in mind. MR TADASHI (8) should push forward from the his draw and give backers a sight.
